A heavyset [[Drall/Legends|Drall]] with graying fur, brightly-painted claws, and pierced ears sporting several intricate dangling ornaments, [[Duchess/Legends|Duchess]] '''Sarella''' represented her family's interests for over thirty [[Standard year/Legends|years]]. While respected in clan circles and possessing ties to both the government and offworld traders and corporations, the Duchess's greatest resource was [[Drusa]], owner of the [[Luminous Gardens]] health spa, who provided her with information on both local and [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] politics.<ref name="CCW" />
